chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-4017 of 2024 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For order on office objection Nos.17 and 27. 2.For order on CMA No.17683/2024 3.For hearing of CMA No.17684/2024 4.For hearing of main case. 13.02.2025 Mr.Kazim Hussain Mehesar, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr.Sandeep Malani, A.A.G. Learned counsel for the petitioner could not substantiate that the petitioner is an aggrieved person within the meaning of Article 199 of the Constitution, even otherwise, direct recourse under writ jurisdiction has been taken without exhausting any adequate prior remedy. The record demonstrate that even the petitioner has not approached the concerned authorities. The petition is found to be misconceived, hence, dismissed. Judge Judge NASIR
